title: 3Powers design oracles (design-oracles.yaml)
description: Catalog of design-oracle gates unioned onto a design change's gate set. Each oracle names an adapter-supplied gate; a selected oracle whose tool is absent is quarantined, never passed.

oracles.description: Oracle kind -> its gate binding and optional thresholds. Trim the map to change which oracles a design change must face.

gate.description: The canonical design-oracle gate name (e.g. contract_check, component_contract, a11y_scan, visual_regression).

description.description: Human-readable note describing what the oracle asserts.

standard.description: For accessibility: the standard checked (e.g. WCAG-2.1-AA).

min_similarity.description: For visual regression: the minimum similarity threshold.
